Constant connectivity fuels overthinking in relationships and work, blurring boundaries and demanding constant digital proof of care. This relentless stimulation prevents rest, leading to anxiety, fatigue, and sleep deprivation. Finding balance through digital boundaries and offline activities is crucial for well-being.
